description: Set or update a member's access level in a permissioned space. The authenticated user must have AddMembers access (and RemoveMembers if modifying an existing member). Cannot grant access higher than the requesting user's own access.

arbiterDid.description: DID of the arbiter managing the space.

spaceKey.description: Key of the space to modify.

member.description: The member whose access is being set.

resolverDepth.description: Maximum depth for resolving remote space members. Defaults to 3.

errors.name: ArbiterNotExists
errors.description: No arbiter with this DID exists.

errors.name: SpaceNotExists
errors.description: The referenced space does not exist.

errors.name: PermissionDenied
errors.description: The user does not have sufficient permissions.

errors.name: PermissionChanged
errors.description: The arbiter state changed since the request was submitted.

errors.name: RemoteSpaceReferencesLocalArbiter
errors.description: Cannot add a remote space member that references the local arbiter — use a local space member instead.
